fields.name: cityName
fields.description: name of the city of the location; equal to name if the location is a city

fields.name: cityCode
fields.description: IATA code of the city of the location; equal to IATAcode if the location is a city

fields.name: countryName
fields.description: name of the country of the location

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: code of the country of the location in ISO standard

fields.name: stateCode
fields.description: code of the state of the location if any

fields.name: regionCode
fields.description: code of the region of the location in ISO standard
